VR 1.0
PT J
AU Webb, H
   Pierce, E
AF Webb, Hailey
   Pierce, Ethan
TI A Comprehensive Database of Thawing Permafrost Locations Across
   Alaska
SO Earth System Science Data Discussions
LA English
DT Article
DE permafrost; thermokarst; Alaska; thaw; database
ID PERMAFROST DEGRADATION; THERMOKARST; ALASKA
AB We compiled the most comprehensive database of permafrost thaw and
   thermokarst features across Alaska, drawing on 44 sources and
   including 19,540 labeled locations. The database provides a
   consistent training and validation corpus for machine-learning
   models of permafrost hazard.
TC 5
Z9 5
PY 2025
DI 10.5194/essd-2025-557
UT WOS:001234567890001
WC Geosciences, Multidisciplinary
SC Geology
PU COPERNICUS
SN 1866-3508
EI 1866-3516
ER

PT B
AU Smith, J
   Jones, K
AF Smith, James
   Jones, Karen
BE Editor, A
TI Permafrost Mapping with Satellite Data
SO HANDBOOK OF CRYOSPHERE REMOTE SENSING
LA English
DT Book Chapter
AB This chapter reviews the state of the art in satellite-based
   permafrost mapping. We cover thermal, optical, and radar sensors
   with a focus on Arctic applications.
PY 2020
UT WOS:000999999999001
WC Geosciences
PU ACADEMIC PRESS
